# Australian Tax Estimate
# https://lachlanallison.github.io/tax-estimate-calculator/

> Static browser calculator for Australian individual income tax estimates using published ATO rates. Covers salary, investments, rental income, deductions, Medicare levy, MLS, HELP repayments, and PAYG. Not tax advice.

## App
- /

## Features
- Live estimate summary: refund or amount owing, total tax, income/deduction/rental breakdown (non-zero fields only)
- Multiple rental properties with per-property expenses
- Saved profiles (local browser storage) — switch, save, save as, new, delete
- Prorata helper — scale part-year amounts to a full year, or add remaining pay periods
- Resident and foreign resident brackets

## Calculator sections
- Tax year and residency
- Income: salary, interest, franked/unfranked dividends, franking credits, government payments, capital gains, business, foreign income
- Rental properties: gross rent, expenses, depreciation (net rent in income; expenses in deductions)
- Deductions: myTax items D1–D15
- Medicare levy, SAPTO, hospital cover, MLS family status
- Study loan (HELP / VSL / SSL / TSL / SFSS) compulsory repayment
- Tax withheld and credits: PAYG salary, other, instalments

## Technical
- Static site, no build step — HTML, CSS, vanilla JavaScript
- Rates in js/rates.js (updated from ATO when income years change)
- GitHub: https://github.com/lachlanallison/tax-estimate-calculator
- Built by Lachlan Allison: https://lachlanallison.com/

## Disclaimer
- Estimate only; not affiliated with the ATO
- Simplified assumptions (e.g. repayment income equals taxable income; no prior-year losses or zone offsets)
- Confirm figures with the ATO or a registered tax agent before lodging

## Rate sources
- https://www.ato.gov.au/tax-rates-and-codes/tax-rates-australian-residents
- https://www.ato.gov.au/tax-rates-and-codes/tax-rates-foreign-residents
- https://www.ato.gov.au/Rates/HELP,-TSL-and-SFSS-repayment-thresholds-and-rates/
